title: Democratic Republic of Congo: English Speaking Medical Facilities
body: "The Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office (FCDO) does not accept any liability to any person or company for any financial loss or damage arising from the use of this information or from any failure to give information.This list is not exhaustive, and is subject to change at any time.
